title.en: China-to-Zambia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Zambia ZABS conformity requirements, ERB licensing, ZESCO grid-connection specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and GET FiT / Scaling Solar programme context — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与赞比亚ZABS合格评定要求、ERB许可、ZESCO并网规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及GET FiT / Scaling Solar项目背景——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與尚比亞ZABS合格評定要求、ERB許可、ZESCO併網規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及GET FiT / Scaling Solar計畫背景——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ZABS conformity scope determination, ERB licensing decision, ZESCO grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Zambia ZABS conformity assessment requirements, ERB licensing conditions, ZESCO grid-connection technical specifications, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ZABS合格评定范围裁定、ERB许可决定、ZESCO并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行赞比亚ZABS合格评定要求、ERB许可条件、ZESCO并网技术规格及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ZABS合格評定範圍裁定、ERB許可決定、ZESCO併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行尚比亞ZABS合格評定要求、ERB許可條件、ZESCO併網技術規格及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Zambia, the key practical gaps are: (1) ZABS conformity assessment — Zambia requires an import conformity certificate for regulated products; verify whether PV inverters fall under the current ZABS mandatory certification scheme; (2) ERB licensing — grid-tied PV installations require ERB licensing as an electricity generator; equipment must satisfy ERB technical conditions; (3) ZESCO grid-connection — grid-tied inverters must meet ZESCO network connection requirements including IEC 62116 anti-islanding, 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V parameter validation, and protection settings; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence is required by project specifications for utility-scale, C&I, and mining solar; (5) IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence. China GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 are not automatically accepted as ZABS, ERB, or ZESCO compliance evidence and cannot substitute IEC-referenced test reports without supplementary evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口赞比亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）ZABS合格评定——赞比亚对受监管产品要求进口合格证书；核实光伏逆变器是否属于ZABS现行强制认证计划范围；（2）ERB许可——并网光伏装置须作为发电商取得ERB许可，设备须满足ERB技术条件；（3）ZESCO并网——并网逆变器须满足ZESCO电网接入要求，包括IEC 62116防孤岛、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数验证及保护整定；（4）大型、工商业和矿业太阳能项目规格要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据。中国GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024不被ZABS、ERB或ZESCO自动接受为合规证据，在没有补充证据的情况下不可替代IEC引用测试报告。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口尚比亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）ZABS合格評定——尚比亞對受監管產品要求進口合格證書；核實光伏逆變器是否屬於ZABS現行強制認證計畫範圍；（2）ERB許可——併網光伏裝置須作為發電商取得ERB許可，設備須滿足ERB技術條件；（3）ZESCO併網——併網逆變器須滿足ZESCO電網接入要求，包括IEC 62116防孤島、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數驗證及保護整定；（4）大型、工商業和礦業太陽能項目規格要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（5）IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據。中國GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024不被ZABS、ERB或ZESCO自動接受為合規證據，在沒有補充證據的情況下不可替代IEC引用測試報告。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
